FR-01.title: Freelancer Registration
requirements: Register with email and create profile
Add skills, hourly rate, and portfolio

FR-03.title: Job Posting
requirements: Post jobs with description, budget, and timeline
Set required skills and experience level
Choose fixed-price or hourly contract type

FR-04.title: Job Search and Proposals
requirements: Search jobs by keyword, skill, and budget
Filter by job type, experience level, and duration
Submit proposals with cover letter and bid

FR-06.title: Escrow Payment System
requirements: Client funds escrow before work starts
Automatic weekly billing for hourly contracts

FR-07.title: Messaging and File Sharing
requirements: Real-time messaging between client and freelancer

FR-09.title: Freelancer Portfolio
requirements: Showcase completed projects with images and descriptions

FR-01.title: Build Freelancer Registration API
FR-01.description: Create POST /api/auth/register (freelancer type). PATCH /api/freelancers/profile (skills, hourly_rate, bio). POST /api/freelancers/portfolio (projects with images). Identity verification flow. Skill test endpoints.

FR-01.title: Build Freelancer Onboarding
FR-01.description: Create profile setup wizard: personal info, skills selector with search, hourly rate, portfolio upload with drag-drop, identity document upload, and optional skill assessments.

FR-02.title: Build Client Registration API
FR-02.description: Create POST /api/auth/register (client type, company details). Document verification queue. POST /api/clients/payment-method (Stripe setup). Client profile with project history.

FR-02.title: Build Client Onboarding
FR-02.description: Create client setup: company/individual toggle, company details form, document upload, and payment method setup with Stripe Elements.

FR-03.title: Build Job Posting API
FR-03.description: Create POST /api/jobs (title, description, budget_min, budget_max, contract_type, skills, experience_level, duration, visibility). PATCH for edits. Close/reopen endpoints.

FR-03.title: Build Job Posting Form
FR-03.description: Create job posting form with rich text editor, skill tag input, budget range inputs, contract type selector (fixed/hourly), duration estimate, and visibility toggle.

FR-04.title: Build Job Search and Proposal API
FR-04.description: Create GET /api/jobs/search with filters. POST /api/jobs/:id/proposals (cover_letter, bid_amount, estimated_duration). GET /api/proposals (freelancer's proposals with status).

FR-04.title: Build Job Search and Proposal UI
FR-04.description: Create job search page with filters sidebar. Job detail with proposal submission form (bid, cover letter, timeline). My Proposals page with status tracking.

FR-05.title: Build Contract API
FR-05.description: Create POST /api/contracts (from accepted proposal). POST /api/contracts/:id/milestones (fixed-price). POST /api/contracts/:id/time-log (hourly). PATCH /api/contracts/:id/modify (mutual agreement).

FR-05.title: Build Contract Management UI
FR-05.description: Create contract page with terms, milestone tracker with submit/approve buttons, time tracker with start/stop, activity log, and modification request dialog.

FR-06.title: Build Escrow System
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/escrow/fund (client funds milestone). POST /api/escrow/release (on milestone approval). Automatic hourly billing job. POST /api/disputes (pause payment, collect evidence).

FR-06.title: Build Payment Dashboard
FR-06.description: Create financial overview for both parties: escrow balance, payment history, pending milestones, hourly earnings chart. Dispute filing form with evidence upload.

FR-07.title: Build Messaging API
FR-07.description: Create WebSocket messaging. POST /api/messages (text + file attachment). GET /api/conversations. File versioning: POST /api/contracts/:id/deliverables (version tracked uploads).

FR-07.title: Build Messaging UI
FR-07.description: Create chat interface with conversation list, message thread with file attachments, file upload button, and deliverables section with version history.

FR-08.title: Build Review API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/contracts/:id/review (after contract closes, both parties). Category ratings (communication, quality, deadlines). Calculate profile averages.

FR-08.title: Build Review UI
FR-08.description: Create post-contract review form with star ratings per category, text review, and submit. Profile review section showing all reviews with category breakdowns.

FR-09.title: Build Portfolio API
FR-09.description: Create CRUD for portfolio items: title, description, images, project_url, client testimonial, category. GET /api/freelancers/:id/portfolio (public view).

FR-09.title: Build Portfolio UI
FR-09.description: Create portfolio manager with add/edit project form, image gallery upload, live link field, and testimonial input. Public portfolio page with filterable grid.

FR-10.title: Build Admin API
FR-10.description: Create admin endpoints: GET /api/admin/verifications (queue), PATCH /api/admin/users/:id/status. Fee config CRUD. GET /api/admin/disputes with resolution tools. Platform analytics.

FR-10.title: Build Admin Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create admin panel with verification queue, user management table, fee configuration, dispute review with evidence viewer, and analytics dashboard (users, revenue, active contracts).
